name: Demonic Blade
short_description: A boy. A demon. A pizza delivery girl. Sometimes all you need is to be in the wrong place at the wrong time. Everything is different than it seems to be.
detailed_description:
Tom's life wasn't exactly normal. And it will get even worse.
Sarah's hope is gone. But will she regain it?
Anna just wants to live a normal life. But she knows she never will.

Follow the story of three characters, as they struggle to find their purpose in the world they found themselves in.
A modern, urban fantasy Visual Novel. Action, drama, mysteries.

What you'll get:

  • about 3-4 hours of the story (depending on reading speed and your imagination)
  • atmospheric post-rock music (including a few vocal tracks)
